subject: [PATCH v3 13/16] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd (UFFD) read-write-protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftest suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including async and sync modes, page mapping, mprotect, GUP walks, and fork operations. They verify that RWP works correctly in different memory types, such as anonymous, shared memory, and huge pages. The patch also includes a test for invalid register mode combinations. The goal is to ensure the correctness of UFFD's RWP feature.
